title: BBS REFORGE
description: Animation studio and content creation tool
body:
![bbs reforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6c729af57059ebc50b89d64f1424a3a9e35b48f.png)



# **BBS Reforge Alpha**

**BBS Reforge** is a reconverted and fully adapted version of the famous **BBS Mod by McHorse and converted by Over and AxDev**, specifically updated for Minecraft **1.21.1**.
This mod stays true to the original goal: providing content creators with a complete set of tools to create animations, roleplay scenes, machinimas, and cinematic sequences directly inside Minecraft.

BBS Reforge brings the power of the original BBS Mod into modern versions of the game, while maintaining smooth and intuitive usability.

# **Feature Set BBS REFORGE**

- Dynamic Lighting Support: Adds real-time dynamic light rendering during replay and camera scenes, greatly improving the visual quality of videos and cinematic recordings.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SXcfg-kvYt0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![fix light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/948b7fd3ff842374fab53640525aa27d25cf55e0.png)

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ff9efb711b7695b0494820c7e654066748374e.png)

# **Feature Set BBS**

- Recording and playback of basic player actions.

- Keyframe-based replay editor.

- Clip-based camera editor.

- Support for Blockbench models (animations, meshes, variables, etc.).

- Partial support for Snowstorm particle effects.

- Model blocks that allow you to place and preserve custom models in the world.

- Form system allowing you to combine animated models, blocks, items, images, particles, etc. to create appearances for actors and model blocks.

- And many useful UI improvements…

Compared to the Blockbuster mod, the user experience of BBS has been significantly improved! However, in terms of raw features, it still remains below Blockbuster.

**Examples**
